title: Flywheel workspace config
description: Per-repo configuration for the Flywheel VS Code extension. Place this file at the workspace root as `.flywheel.json` to pin a graph and skip the prompt.

rootNodeId.description: Slug (e.g. `lemon-zebra-0042`) or UUID of the node to load as the graph root. Required for auto-open.

repoFilter.description: When true, the graph is filtered to nodes whose repo matches the workspace's git remote.

autoOpenGraph.description: Pop the graph panel automatically when this workspace opens. Off by default to respect the user's screen state.
